examples: The self-tuning mechanism will backfill if necessary.
We backfill, kick some leaves around, drag over a small fallen tree.
Added: You can craft Destroyed Stone to backfill holes while mining.
Backfill: material used to build up and consolidate the land behind a seawall or similar structure.
It added that work was continuing to backfill the hole so SWW could carry out its works on the sewer.
